title: Diabetes Detection And Insulin Access Gaps In Low- And Middle-Income Countries
summary: Build a verified workflow for measuring diabetes detection and insulin access gaps in LMICs, linking STEPS survey data and medicine-availability data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for measuring diabetes detection and insulin access gaps in LMICs, linking STEPS survey data and medicine-availability data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
